suggestions.rationale: Explicitly deferred from ACDT #81 for this week's call. Need to decide next devnet scope and whether to consolidate BAL/Glamsterdam tracks now that benchmarking on bal-devnet-7 is progressing.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7928 state-access decoupling PR review and merge decision
suggestions.rationale: Action item from ACDT #81 for EL teams to review before ACDE Thursday. This 100 gas pre-charge / 2500 post-charge split requires implementation changes across most clients and affects glamsterdam-devnet-6 scope.

ACDT #81 deferred all EL changes (EIP-8246, EIP-2780, EIP-8038, EIP-7954, EIP-7997) to devnet-6. Need to confirm priority order (benchmarking > 8246 > 7997) and readiness timeline, especially given bal-devnet-7 benchmarking is still ongoing.
CL-only devnet-5 was targeting launch as early as June 2. Need status update on stability, EIP-8045 implementation, and whether any issues emerged that affect devnet-6 planning.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 auth refund expansion PR and EIP-2780 simplification PR decisions
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #81 noted two open spec PRs: 5-rule auth refund scheme for EIP-8037 and removal of self-transfer/precompile carve-outs for EIP-2780. Both pending benchmark results but affect glamsterdam-devnet-6 scope.

suggestions.topic: REST-SSZ Engine API decision outcome (PR #764 vs #793)
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDT #80 to ACDE Thursday (May 22). No subsequent ACDT mentions the outcome. If ACDE decided, confirm which approach was chosen and impact on glamsterdam devnet implementation.

ACDT #81 identified benchmarking/optimizations as top EL priority and blocker for final gas cost numbers. Need update on progress and estimated completion to unblock EIP-8038 final values for devnet-6.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7954 contract code size limit benchmarking results
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDT #80 for glamsterdam-devnet-5, then pushed to devnet-6 in ACDT #81. Need benchmark results comparing 32KB/48KB/64KB before finalizing spec for devnet-6.
